title: Hoplophytum fasciatum
taxonomy: Hoplophytum fasciatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae. It is native to Australia. The classification of Hoplophytum fasciatum is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, the class Magnoliopsida, the order Gentianales, the family Asclepiadaceae, and the genus Hoplophytum. This species is also known as the 'Wedge-leaf Milkweed' and is an endangered plant in Australia. Its classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of this unique plant species.
